description: Model a Constructive Solid Geometry (CSG) hollow 4-way pipe cross fitting in SolveSpace consisting of two intersecting orthogonal pipes centered at the origin (0,0,0). Each pipe must have an Outer Diameter (OD) of 30.0 mm, an Inner Diameter (ID) of 24.0 mm, and a total length of 100.0 mm (extending 50.0 mm symmetrically in both directions). The central intersection must be completely hollow to allow fluid flow between all four branches. Save the parametric model as /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/pipe_cross_fitting.slvs and export the geometry as an STL file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/pipe_cross_fitting.stl.
